title: Optimizing a Scheduling Model
scenario: Create a scheduling model for a call center that allocates agents to shifts based on their availability, skills, and past performance. The model should minimize overtime and maximize agent satisfaction. The final output should be a markdown table with the optimal shift assignments for each agent.
constraints: Must include a brief explanation of the algorithm used to generate the shift assignments.
Must provide a clear description of how agent satisfaction and overtime were optimized.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the algorithm used to generate shift assignments is clearly described and relevant to the task.
Verify that a clear description of how agent satisfaction and overtime were optimized is provided.
Check if the markdown table is correctly formatted and easy to read.
Verify that the shift assignments for each agent are correctly generated and make sense in the context of the call center.
